body:
## Problem
Manual entry of years of work history is tedious and prone to errors.

## Impact
- High friction/cognitive load
- Low efficiency for power users (Heuristic #7)

## Tasks
- [ ] Integrate a PDF/DOCX resume parsing library (e.g., `resume-parser`)
- [ ] Add "Upload Existing Resume" button to the Dashboard and Editor
- [ ] Implement a LinkedIn Profile import feature
- [ ] Map parsed fields to the existing `resumeData` schema
title: [UX-04] Implement Resume Parser/Import (LinkedIn & PDF)
